commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bb5a5d99d773f727ddc4ac7246e40d08b94d2618)
commands.review_summary:
The PR raises the Skill Workshop proposal description limit from 160 to 500 bytes in the agent tool schema and workshop service validation, adjusts the service error text, and updates the service boundary test values.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests 0. Total 0 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main and v2026.6.6 still enforce and document a 160-byte Skill Workshop proposal-description limit through the tool schema, service validation, prompt guidance, and docs; I did not run a live webchat/tool invocation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are maintainer acceptance of the fixed 500-byte contract and contributor-supplied real behavior proof, so this should stay in human review rather than a repair lane.

target.title: skill_workshop: increase or make configurable the 160-byte description limit
target.body:
## Summary
Increase skill_workshop description limit from 160 to 500 bytes

Fixes #92425

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Increase hardcoded 160-byte limit to 500 bytes for skill proposal descriptions, and improve validation error with actionable guidance.

**Real setup tested**: OpenClaw dev environment (pnpm gateway:dev)
- **Runtime**: node

**Exact steps or command run after fix**:

```bash
Run bound test: pnpm vitest run src/skills/workshop/service.test.ts -t "bounds proposal descriptions"
```

**After-fix evidence**:

```
PASS (1) FAIL (0)
```

**Observed result after the fix**:
Descriptions up to 500 bytes now pass validation; 501+ byte descriptions are correctly rejected.

**What was not tested**:
Edge cases: the 433-byte existing description case, untested on live webchat/Skill Workshop UI
target.author: lzyyzznl

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
